{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Assistant",
  "description": "Fadac Resources and Services Limited - We provide businesses with human capital solutions that can help improve oral performance while reducing employment practice risk. We can assist organization no matter how large or small, to establish, outsource and troubleshoot any human resources functions/ challenges. Our belief is that people are the greatest asset in the organization, regardless of the business size, industry, and market share. We provide the best professionals backed with solid years of experience and knowledge, and their job is to integrate solutions for your business needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogudu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR strategies and initiatives aligned with the overall business strategy
	Bridge management and employee relations by addressing demands, grievances, and other workplace issues
	Manage end-to-end recruitment and selection processes
	Support current and future business needs through effective talent development, engagement, motivation, and retention
	Develop, monitor, and improve HR systems, policies, procedures, and overall strategies
	Foster and maintain a positive and productive work environment
	Oversee and manage a performance appraisal system that drives high performance
	Develop and maintain competitive pay plans and benefits programs
	Identify training needs and design, implement, and monitor training programs
	Provide decision support to management through HR metrics and reporting
	Ensure full legal compliance across all HR practices.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
	At least 1 year of proven experience as an HR Assistant
	Strong knowledge of HR systems, databases, and HR metrics
	People-oriented and results-driven mindset
	Demonstrated ability to develop HR strategies and lead initiatives
	Excellent listening, negotiation, and presentation skills
	Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build relationships at all organizational levels
	In-depth knowledge of labor laws and HR best practice


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;favour.a@fadacresources.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

HR Assistant Job at Fadac Resources and Services Limited




        
    

        
        Fadac Resources and Services Limited - We provide businesses with human capital solutions that can help improve oral performance while reducing employment practice risk. We can assist organization no matter how large or small, to establish, outsource and troubleshoot any human resources functions/ challenges. Our belief is that people are the greatest asset in the organization, regardless of the business size, industry, and market share. We provide the best professionals backed with solid years of experience and knowledge, and their job is to integrate solutions for your business needs.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Assistant

Job Location: Ogudu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR strategies and initiatives aligned with the overall business strategy
	Bridge management and employee relations by addressing demands, grievances, and other workplace issues
	Manage end-to-end recruitment and selection processes
	Support current and future business needs through effective talent development, engagement, motivation, and retention
	Develop, monitor, and improve HR systems, policies, procedures, and overall strategies
	Foster and maintain a positive and productive work environment
	Oversee and manage a performance appraisal system that drives high performance
	Develop and maintain competitive pay plans and benefits programs
	Identify training needs and design, implement, and monitor training programs
	Provide decision support to management through HR metrics and reporting
	Ensure full legal compliance across all HR practices.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
	At least 1 year of proven experience as an HR Assistant
	Strong knowledge of HR systems, databases, and HR metrics
	People-oriented and results-driven mindset
	Demonstrated ability to develop HR strategies and lead initiatives
	Excellent listening, negotiation, and presentation skills
	Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build relationships at all organizational levels
	In-depth knowledge of labor laws and HR best practice


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "ICT Specialist",
  "description": "Project Affluence Limited is currently&nbsp;recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: ICT Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Oil and Gas/Chemical

Job Summary


	We are seeking a hands-on ICT Lead to manage the Company&rsquo;s ICT and telecommunications services, including IT support, networks and Internet services, telecoms/CUG systems, website and email administration, cybersecurity, CCTV and AV systems, and digital media support.
	The role supports reliable ICT operations in line with ISO 9001:2015 requirements.


Role


	Provide hardware and software support for computers, mobile devices, printers, and business applications.
	Support networks, Internet services, user accounts, backups, and telecom systems, including VoIP/PBX and CUG management.
	Install and maintain CCTV systems and virtual meeting/AV equipment.
	Manage company website, email systems, and cybersecurity controls.
	Support digital marketing through graphics and social media content.
	Maintain ICT documentation, provide user support and training, and coordinate vendors in line with ISO 9001:2015.


Education


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information Systems, Multimedia Design, or related field.
	Relevant certifications such as CompTIA, CCNA, Microsoft 365, or related qualifications will be an advantage.


Experience:


	Must have 3 years of experience in ICT support or administration.
	Experience in hardware/software support, networking, telecoms/VoIP/PBX, and Internet service management.
	Experience with CCTV, virtual meeting systems, website and email administration, and cybersecurity practices.
	Experience in graphic design and social media content creation.


Skills:


	Strong troubleshooting skills across operating systems and office applications.
	Knowledge of networking, VoIP/PBX, CCTV systems, and Internet services.
	Familiarity with website CMS, email systems, backup, and recovery tools.
	Proficiency in graphics tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, or similar).
	Strong communication, organisational, and problem-solving skills.


Salary


	N200,000 to N250,000 monthly.
	Salary is negotiable based on experience and qualifications.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CV to:&nbsp;talentfithr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

ICT Specialist Job at Project Affluence Limited




        
    

        
        Project Affluence Limited is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: ICT Specialist

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Oil and Gas/Chemical

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a hands-on ICT Lead to manage the Company’s ICT and telecommunications services, including IT support, networks and Internet services, telecoms/CUG systems, website and email administration, cybersecurity, CCTV and AV systems, and digital media support.
	The role supports reliable ICT operations in line with ISO 9001:2015 requirements.


Role


	Provide hardware and software support for computers, mobile devices, printers, and business applications.
	Support networks, Internet services, user accounts, backups, and telecom systems, including VoIP/PBX and CUG management.
	Install and maintain CCTV systems and virtual meeting/AV equipment.
	Manage company website, email systems, and cybersecurity controls.
	Support digital marketing through graphics and social media content.
	Maintain ICT documentation, provide user support and training, and coordinate vendors in line with ISO 9001:2015.


Education


	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information Systems, Multimedia Design, or related field.
	Relevant certifications such as CompTIA, CCNA, Microsoft 365, or related qualifications will be an advantage.


Experience:


	Must have 3 years of experience in ICT support or administration.
	Experience in hardware/software support, networking, telecoms/VoIP/PBX, and Internet service management.
	Experience with CCTV, virtual meeting systems, website and email administration, and cybersecurity practices.
	Experience in graphic design and social media content creation.


Skills:


	Strong troubleshooting skills across operating systems and office applications.
	Knowledge of networking, VoIP/PBX, CCTV systems, and Internet services.
	Familiarity with website CMS, email systems, backup, and recovery tools.
	Proficiency in graphics tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, or similar).
	Strong communication, organisational, and problem-solving skills.


Salary


	N200,000 to N250,000 monthly.
	Salary is negotiable based on experience and qualifications.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Human Resource Officer Job at Kiyix Recruitment Hub
content:
KIYIX is a recruitment / HR consulting firm and our goal is to to help create one million jobs in Nigeria by 2030. At Kiyix recruitment hub, we help make recruitment a stress-free experience for both the employer and the potential job seekers.

We are a dynamic consulting firm that manages HR, recruitment, and business support services for multiple clients across various industries. We are committed to delivering professional, efficient, and people-focused solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Human Resources Officer to support our client portfolio.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing recruitment processes, employee relations, and HR operations across multiple client organizations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage end-to-end recruitment for client organizations.
	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures.
	Maintain employee records and ensure proper documentation.
	Support onboarding and training of new hires.
	Handle employee relations and disciplinary processes.
	Monitor staff performance and assist with appraisals.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies.
	Provide HR advisory support to clients when necessary.
	Visit client sites to monitor operations and ensure HR compliance.


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree.
	1–3 years of experience in an HR role.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to manage multiple clients and priorities.
	Good knowledge of HR practices and labor laws.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.


Salary
N150,000 per month 

Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Medical Sales Representative – Enugu” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Business Development Executive Job at VURIN Group




        
    

        
        The VURIN Group is a diversified portfolio of businesses across various sectors of the oil and gas and infrastructure industries, in Nigeria and beyond, with the primary mission to establish, grow, and manage the most successful group of energy operations and support businesses, in terms of superior shareholder returns, business leadership, and contribution to society.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive 

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job type: Full time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and pursue new business opportunities across upstream, midstream, and downstream oil and gas sectors.
	Support the development and execution of business development strategies to achieve revenue and growth targets.
	Build and maintain a strong pipeline of prospective clients and projects.
	Present the company’s services to potential clients and participate in client meetings, industry events, and networking engagements.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify emerging opportunities and industry trends.
	Establish and maintain strong relationships with key clients, partners, and regulatory bodies within the industry.
	Manage client accounts to ensure customer satisfaction and repeat business opportunities.
	Identify and track Requests for Quotation (RFQs), Requests for Proposal (RFPs), and Invitations to Tender (ITTs).
	Support the preparation of technical and commercial proposals, capability statements, and bid documentation.
	Collaborate with internal teams including engineering, procurement, operations, finance, and legal to ensure successful project execution.
	Monitor industry developments and provide market intelligence insights to support strategic decision-making.
	Prepare periodic reports on business development activities, sales forecasts, market insights, and tender status updates.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Engineering, Economics, or a related field.
	An MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is an added advantage.


Experience:


	4 – 6 years of experience in business development, sales, or commercial roles.
	At least 3 years of experience within the oil and gas industry.
	Proven experience in contract acquisition, tendering, and client relationship management.
	Experience engaging with IOCs, NOCs, and indigenous oil and gas companies is highly desirable.


Technical Competencies:


	Strong understanding of the Nigerian oil and gas industry structure and value chain.
	Knowledge of procurement and contracting processes used by oil companies.
	Familiarity with local content regulations under the Nigerian Oil and Gas Industry Content Development Act.
	Experience with tendering and bid management processes.
	Understanding of oilfield services including engineering, procurement, marine logistics, fabrication, and maintenance services.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite.


Behavioural Competencies:


	Strong relationship management and networking skills.
	Excellent negotiation and persuasion ability.
	Customer-focused and results-oriented mindset.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving capability.
	Ability to communicate effectively with senior stakeholders and executives.
	Excellent presentation and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
